title: French Chicken Drumstick Skewers
description: Tender chicken drumsticks marinated in a French-inspired fermented blend, grilled to perfection on skewers.
instructions: 2. In a bowl, whisk together the Irish fermented butter blend, olive oil, and a pinch of salt.
3. Add the chicken drumsticks to the bowl and toss to coat evenly with the marinade.
4. Thread the marinated drumsticks onto skewers, leaving a little space between each piece.
5. Grill the skewers for 8-10 minutes per side, or until the chicken reaches an internal temperature of 165°F (74°C).
6. Let the skewers rest for 5 minutes before serving.
